name: Dwimmered Glimmer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>救</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>奇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by banishing 1 face-up monster you control or 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Spellcaster/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as that banished monster. (This card is also still a Trap.) You can only activate 1 "Dwimmered Glimmer" per turn.
eff: Activate this card by banishing 1 face-up monster you control or 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Spellcaster/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as that banished monster. (This card is also still a Trap.) You can only activate 1 "Dwimmered Glimmer" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
